prompt:
My Spring Boot application has an Order entity with validation constraints. I need to test that:
- Order items cannot be empty
- Total amount must be positive
- Customer email is required and valid
- Order date cannot be in the future

How do I test these Bean Validation constraints?

assertions.name: uses_validator_directly
assertions.description: Uses javax.validation.Validator directly without Spring context

assertions.name: creates_test_fixtures
assertions.description: Creates reusable test fixtures/factory methods for test data

assertions.name: verifies_error_messages
assertions.description: Verifies both constraint violation presence and error messages

assertions.name: uses_nested_classes
assertions.description: Uses @Nested classes to group related constraint tests
